prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-DVCHCK-BUN-29PC-18X12-GRN-BNDL Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Deluxe Vinyl Cutting Hobby Craft Kit with Self Healing Mat 18" x 12", Precision Hobby Knife Set, Pick & Hook Set, Tweezers, and Clamps Description: Cut and shape vinyl like a pro with the Deluxe Vinyl Cutting Tool Kit.

This kit comes with everything you need to craft with vinyl: a self healing cutting board, assorted precision hobby blades, scissors, clamps, tweezers and a hook and pick set.

The self-healing mat measures 18" x 12" and comes with handy grid-lines for exact measurements. We've included clamps to hold your vinyl down while you work, and the scissors will assist you in cutting larger pieces.

Additionally we've included a 4 piece hook and pick set as well as 5 assorted tweezers for added accuracy and easy clean up. Make sure to grab this set before your next vinyl cutting project.

16pc Hobby Knife Set Includes:
*(1) Precision Knife w/ 3/8" Chuck & Plastic Grip Handle
*(1) Precision Knife w/ 3/8" Chuck & Metal Handle
*(1) Precision Knife w/ 1/4" Chuck & Metal Handle
*(2) #2 Blades
*(1) #7 Blade
*(1) #10 Blade
*(3) #11 Blades
*(1) #12 Blade
*(1) #17 Blade
*(1) #19 Blade
*(1) #20 Blade
*(1) #21 Blade
*(1) #22 Blade

4pc Pick & Hook Set Includes:
*(1) Straight Pick
*(1) 30 Degree Hook
*(1) Hook
*(1) 90 Degree Hook Search Terms: self-healing cutting board vinyl-working tools hobby tools craft tools Features: - Self Healing Mat: 18" x 12" | Gridlines & Measurement References - Hobby Knife Set: 3 Precision Knives with Assorted Blades Sizes for Any Project - Pick & Hook Set: Soft Grip Handles with Assorted Tips - Assorted Tweezers for Holding Vinyl/Cleaning Up - Clamps for Holding Vinyl Down === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 29pc Vinyl Cutting Mat Kit 18x12
